title: Moving the Wall
description: Coupling detection between two noise-like streams—from baduk to Granger causality. Built an interactive paper with a playable 19×19 board, E1 predictor, 3D move-cloud, and animated walk-through of the theory. Proves that baduk's coupling lives past the linear-Gaussian wall via nonlinear local response.
alt: A Go/Baduk board overlaid with time-series coupling waveforms and transfer entropy notation.

title: Finding Novelty in Finding Novelty
description: Discovered that prompting LLMs as named, published scholars speaking in the third person dramatically overcomes sycophancy and unlocks rigorous methodological critique. A controlled experiment comparing persona configurations led to the refutation of my own initial thesis—proving the method works.
alt: A council of scholar silhouettes debating over a holographic research document with mathematical annotations.

title: Shorelife
description: Daily California beach health forecasts built from official bacteria samples, coastal conditions, and model calibration—live beach explorer, methodology, and a transparent research roadmap.

title: Cross-Market Lead-Lag Research
description: End-to-end pipeline testing whether US equities predict overnight moves in foreign markets via proxy ETFs—multi-market coupling scans with DSR, PBO, White’s Reality Check, and walk-forward validation (clean negative on tradable instruments).
alt: Stylized diagram of cross-region market nodes, phase-shifted return series, and a pair-coupling heatmap suggesting econometric lead–lag testing.

title: Credit Analysis Agentic Workflow
description: Engineered a Cash Scoring XGBoost model achieving 86% ROC-AUC and an automated Agentic Workflow for feature creation. Built a transformer model to categorize bank statements with 95% accuracy.

title: Effect of Strike Counts on Swing
description: Full-stack data analysis from preprocessing to panel data regression. Built an interactive website with 3D models and narrative elements to communicate MLB swing mechanics to non-technical viewers.

title: Balanced Meal... Not
description: A comparative data visualization analyzing the nutritional value of pre-packaged meals against standard health guidelines. Awarded Best Project.

title: 2025 Market Mega Trend
description: Comprehensive macro-economic trend analysis forecasting global market movements for the upcoming year.

title: HMM Stock Analysis
description: Bottom-up fundamental research on HMM to evaluate investment opportunities driven by Northern Sea Route (NSR) expansion.
